completed_tasks.name: Add versioning policy doc (CONTRIBUTING.md + CLAUDE.md pointer)
Add Sync Trigger scope to v1.6 + postpone-review design question to v1.5
Refactor PROP-07 tests: 'deferred to v1.7' → 'deferred to v1.5' (correct domain)
Strikethrough v1.4-era archive material (mixed v1.5/v1.8 per domain)
Update pending todos to reference Hardening as v1.8
Free v1.4.2 slot (TaskPaper relocated to MAYBE-IDEAS.md, no version slot)
Post-audit cleanup: docs/index.html landing page roadmap
Run full check-all (2558 pytest + 85 vitest + ruff + mypy)

decisions.decision: Strict semver from v1.5 onward: X.Y.0 features, X.Y.Z true patches only, X.0.0 breaking
decisions.rationale: Pre-v1.4.1 used .Z slots loosely for themed feature increments. Confused future agents. Strict convention going forward.
Git tags + CHANGELOG + PyPI history are sacred. Renaming retroactively would break references.

decisions.decision: Audit trail via markdown strikethrough in archives: ~~v1.7~~ v1.5 / ~~v1.7~~ v1.8 per domain
decisions.rationale: Preserves historical decision context for future agents reading planning material chronologically. CommonMark renders consistently across GitHub/VS Code.

decisions.decision: PROP-07 test refs go to v1.5 (project-writes domain), NOT v1.8 as plan literally said
decisions.rationale: Plan's mechanical 'v1.7 → v1.8' substitution was domain-wrong. Project writes land at v1.5 in the new ordering. User confirmed v1.5. Lesson: mechanical rename plans need a domain-check pass.

decisions.decision: Pure rename commits MUST contain zero content edits
decisions.rationale: Preserves git's 50%-similarity rename heuristic so `git log --follow` traces history cleanly. Verified R100 on both renames.

decisions.decision: Sync Trigger folded into v1.6 (not standalone)
decisions.rationale: Same bridge surface as UI ops. Domain-related. Avoids slot proliferation.

decisions.decision: Smart Perspective Content demoted to v1.7 (after UI), not promoted before
decisions.rationale: Two-step (show_perspective then list_tasks) is sufficient for review workflow. Rule-parsing risk doesn't justify pulling forward.

decisions.decision: Postpone-review API shape deferred — captured as open design question in MILESTONE-v1.5.md
decisions.rationale: Actions block vs. editable nextReviewDate field. Both have trade-offs. Resolve during v1.5 planning, not now.

decisions.decision: Versioning policy lives in two places: CONTRIBUTING.md (canonical) + CLAUDE.md (one-liner pointer)
decisions.rationale: Human contributors read CONTRIBUTING; agents read CLAUDE.md. One-liner pointer ensures agent discovery without prompting.

decisions.decision: TaskPaper Output stays in MAYBE-IDEAS.md without a version slot
decisions.rationale: Freed v1.4.2 slot for the upcoming UNTIL-serialization hotfix. TaskPaper not committed-grade; future direction.

next_action: Fix the 'UNTIL must match YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ format, got 20260516' repetitionRule bug. repetitionRule.end.date serializes as date-only instead of full UTC datetime. Ship as v1.4.2 hotfix. OmniFocus task ID: hJqHF2GJAG3 (parent mm_b-pw4bYq is sequential; sibling cvk9dw989E3 complete, so this is now unblocked).
context_notes: Renumber session is fully shipped (pushed to origin/main). Next work block is a SEPARATE session for the v1.4.2 hotfix. All planning material, source code, and tests already agree on the new ordering (v1.5 Project Writes / v1.6 UI+Sync / v1.7 Smart Perspective / v1.8 Hardening). The v1.4.2 slot is reserved and empty, ready for the hotfix to drop in.

milestone_state.v1.5: Project Writes — needs planning (postpone-review API shape is the live design question)
milestone_state.v1.6: UI & Perspectives + Sync Trigger folded scope

verification_summary.subagent_audits: cavecrew-investigator + cavecrew-reviewer both clean after docs/index.html fix
